title: Oxygen Critical
description: A small mod implementing the drowning fade-to-black animation from subnautica
body:
![wakatime](https://wakatime.com/badge/user/cf7a6074-58ab-4680-87b6-b86b283cb511/project/842b91e4-4ea3-48a3-b50f-a24929f53141.svg)

# What is Oxygen Critical?

**Oxygen Critical** is a tiny visual enhancement mod that adds some much-needed tension to drowning.

Inspired by the game *Subnautica*, this mod makes your screen slowly fade to black as your oxygen runs out, no more calmly drowning like it's just another Tuesday

That's it. That's the mod.

I also had this mod done for a month but I was lazy to make a modrinth description for it, so you're only getting it now

## Configuration

Look at the config screen if you really want to, but it's nothing really exciting. The config *should* be the best you can get out of the mod, so I wouldn't really touch it

### Compatibility

Should work with pretty much anything. It's a client-side mod, so throw it into your modpack and forget about it—your server doesn’t even need to know.

---
Open-source, lightweight, and probably not going to break anything. Enjoy the existential dread. 🫧
